description: A no-show recovery drafted for SMS, but only email consent is on record. Option-B (fail-closed) consent BLOCKS the draft — a non-consented channel never proceeds, and no artifact is created.

approvedClaims: Our program includes weekly live coaching sessions.

evidenceRecords.content: Applicant did not attend the scheduled discovery call.

output_schema_constraints: run is policy_blocked at consent with reason matching 'no recorded consent'
